name: Record of a Novice Chair Maker
description: A record of a novice chair maker who took the first step.

recipes.name: First Step 1 (-70) 1
recipes.description: That beauty of the bonfire you once saw. Let's make a simple bonfire first.

recipes.name: Commitment to Flames 1 (-75) 1
recipes.description: It seems that even changing the way of assembling firewood will change the way it burns. Let's focus on how it burns without changing the materials.

recipes.name: To More Effective Flames 1 (-80) 2
recipes.description: You are getting the hang of it little by little. Let's make further improvements to make the flames more effective.

recipes.name: How to Use Stones 2 (-85) 2
recipes.description: While lining up stones, you vaguely came up with an idea that the bonfire would be more stable if it's surrounded with stones.

recipes.name: Trial and Error 2 (-95) 3
recipes.description: Stones provided high stability. Further stabilization may increase the efficiency of combustion.

recipes.name: Stones, Bonfire and Me 2 (-105) 3
recipes.description: You feel like you've become friends with stones. Let's make use of your experience and aim for the perfect stonework.

name: Record of an Advanced Chair Maker
description: A record of an advanced chair maker who is aiming for a higher state.

recipes.name: New Challenge 3 (-115) 5
recipes.description: Let's explore a more modern and beautiful bonfire, not the conventional one.

recipes.name: Unexpected Discovery 3 (-130) 5
recipes.description: It's unexpected. The platform provided for better appearance actually improved the efficiency of combustion. Let's make it again.

recipes.name: The Flow of Air 3 (-145) 6
recipes.description: It seems that the new air flow accelerated the combustion. Let's pay more attention to the air flow.

recipes.name: Commitment to the Platform 4 (-160) 6
recipes.description: The previous platform got too hot and you got burned when you were cleaning it up. Let's change the material and try again.

recipes.name: Ensuring Flammability 4 (-180) 7
recipes.description: By changing the material, the air flow changed and the way it burned changed as well. Trial and error continues.

recipes.name: Ideal Flames 4 (-200) 7
recipes.description: You saw the image of the ideal flames. Now that you have a better idea of the flow of air and the material of the platform, you can make these ideal flames.

name: Record of an Expert Chair Maker
description: A record of an expert chair maker who is trying to master the essence of chair making.

recipes.name: Gorgeousness in Festivals 5 (-220) 9
recipes.description: Let's change the platform. Isn't it possible to create a gorgeous bonfire that brightens festivals?

recipes.name: Beauty in How It Burns 5 (-245) 9
recipes.description: The design of the platform and how the bonfire burns. The harmony of these two will create a higher level of beauty.

recipes.name: Can a Bonfire be Artwork? 5 (-270) 10
recipes.description: Evaluations are not really needed. But you want to know if your bonfire shakes people's emotions.

recipes.name: Self-pride as a Bonfire Maker 6 (-295) 10
recipes.description: As a bonfire maker, you've been receiving more and more requests to make bonfires. Let's make a bonfire that will live up to your reputation.

recipes.name: Amor Cupid 6 (-325) 11
recipes.description: You received a request to build a bonfire to make the declaration of love more romantic. You are not sure what has to be done, but let's make a beautiful bonfire anyway.

recipes.name: Everything You Can Do Now 6 (-355) 11
recipes.description: Let's make a bonfire by combining all of the experience you have gained so far. Not for anyone else, but for yourself.

name: Record of a Novice Bonfire Maker
description: A record of a novice bonfire maker who took the first step.

recipes.name: Making the First Chair 1 (-60) 1
recipes.description: What is a chair...? First, let's make something to sit on.

recipes.name: More Like a Chair 1 (-65) 1
recipes.description: A thing you just sit on cannot be called a chair. Let's make improvements in search of more of a chair-like appearance.

recipes.name: Variety of Chairs 1 (-70) 2
recipes.description: Chairs seem to come in many shapes. Let's recreate the chair you saw while traveling.

recipes.name: Longing for the Backrest 1 (-75) 2
recipes.description: Luxury chairs come with a backrest. Let's make a chair with a backrest.

recipes.name: Awareness of Stability 1 (-80) 3
recipes.description: A sense of stability provides a sense of security when sitting. Next, let's make a chair with stable legs.

recipes.name: More Stability 1 (-85) 3
recipes.description: Chair shouldn't break even if a large person sits down. A sense of stability is necessary to withstand any weight.

recipes.name: Sense of Aesthetic 1 (-90) 4
recipes.description: Should chairs pursue only functionality? No, you have to be more conscious of how it looks.

recipes.name: Simple is the Best 2 (-95) 4
recipes.description: Beauty comes from eliminating waste. Let's make a simple chair by making use of your experience.

name: Record of an Expert Bonfire Maker
description: A record of an expert bonfire maker who is trying to master the essence of chair making.

recipes.name: Passion for Materials 3 (-140) 12
recipes.description: You were particular about the shape but weren't conscious of the materials. Let's use quality wood.

recipes.name: More Passion for Materials 3 (-145) 12
recipes.description: You got a piece of wood that is thin but hard to break. You might be able to balance between aesthetic and strength.

recipes.name: Pursuit of Comfort 3 (-150) 1
recipes.description: Your friend told you that the hard seat and backrest were painful. Let's make a chair that can sit comfortably for a long time.

recipes.name: Viewpoint of Formality 4 (-155) 13
recipes.description: You must be aware of where the chair will be placed. Let's make a prestigious chair.

recipes.name: A Chair for a Loved One 4 (-160) 14
recipes.description: Let's make a chair while imagining your loved one is sitting on it. You'll be able to create something nice.

recipes.name: Essence of Your Skills 4 (-165) 14
recipes.description: Be proud as a full-fledged craftsman. Let's make your current best chair by using the essence of your skills.

recipes.name: Stairs to the Throne 4 (-170) 15
recipes.description: With sufficient skills, knowledge and experience... Are you qualified to make a throne now? Let's make a prototype first.

recipes.name: Almost at the Top 4 (-175) 15
recipes.description: The period of training is near the end. All it takes now is your preparedness. Let's make the final prototype for a chair suitable for a king.

recipes.name: Craftsmanship 4 (-180) 16
recipes.description: The chair you've been dreaming of making. Now, you should be able to make a throne, an ultimate chair.
